hero.title: The Certificate You Can Trust
hero.subtitle: Celebrity, Music, Political & Space Authentication Experts

features.title: Expert Opinions
features.description: Each autograph is analyzed by up to 5 industry experts. The ACOA authentication team has decades of combined experience with hundreds of thousands of in person autographs.

features.title: Fast Response Time
features.description: Autographs are typically inspected within 72 hours. Mailed-in items can be physically inspected and certified within 5 days.

features.title: Affordable Cost
features.description: Verify the authenticity of autographs without spending a small fortune. We provide a superior service for a better price. Save even more with bulk submissions!
